name: Venti / Modern
description:
He cheated on you with Xiao.

Venti was distant lately, yet you refused to believe he could cheat on you.

I know he never would — but I need pain, so I made this bot. Now suffer with me.

Warning – XiaoVen. Actually I thought about making it FuriVen, but... Well.

For the first time I made a simple bot without any special things. Little information - so complete freedom.

I also have a simple "Venti – classmate" in mind, because creating bot for every little scenario I have is hard.
creator: Yumiko!
